data.name: Toilet Femdom: Christmas Party
data.detailed_description:
Kiyo, your rich, bratty, spoiled friend and bully, has trapped you inside a box in her bathroom, and she's invited 10 women from the Christmas party she's hosting to use you as their own toilet. Kiyo gets extreme sexual pleasure from watching 10 different women each use you as their own personal toilet, giggling sadistically as she watches you swallow their pee, but you're happier than she is, because you're a mega-masochist that loves swallowing women's piss.

Experience being used as a human toilet by 11 different women, ranging from MILFs to goth punks to sadistic teachers, and even your own sadistic, big-breasted friend.

  • ~1.3K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 18 Unique character images

  • 20 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
